profile.title: .NET Consultant
profile.summary: .NET Consultant with {{years}}+ years of experience in full-stack development across enterprise systems, government platforms, and IoT integration. Currently building ticketing, event registration, and visitor management systems for corporate clients. Core expertise in C#/.NET, React, Next.js, and PostgreSQL with Clean Architecture. Experienced in client-facing consultation, solution design, and mentoring junior engineers. Bachelor's degree in Computer Science (System & Networking) from Universiti Tenaga Nasional, Second Class Upper honors.

experiences.company: Rosemallow Technologies Ptd Ltd (Client: E-Tech IT Sdn Bhd)
experiences.description:
- Maintained and enhanced Visitor Management System (bSwift) - .NET Core 8, JavaScript, React Native kiosk app (IC/Passport OCR), HikVision face terminal integration (ISAPI)
- Developed Event Registration System (ERS) - Next.js 15, .NET 10, WPF kiosk with offline capability
- Developed Ticketing System (iDex) - .NET 10, React 19, PostgreSQL, SLA monitoring, email automation
- Client-facing consultation - requirements gathering, solution proposals, and technical presentations
- Clean Architecture, CI/CD pipeline management

- Led full SDLC documentation - Requirements Definition, UI Design, System Specification, and Test Plans using Waterfall methodology
- Mentored and trained junior software engineers across planning, development, and testing phases
- Managed task workflows using Jira, Miro Board, and Azure DevOps with Agile Scrum
- Developed solutions with Power Automate, Power Apps, and Next.js in collaboration with Fujitsu Japan
- Coordinated cross-regional collaboration with Fujitsu teams across Asia and Japan

Content Website Platform (CWP) - Singapore government content management platform:
- Collaborated in a team of 6 developers maintaining 4 portals across the CWP ecosystem (ASP.NET, C#)
- Integrated User Control System (UCS) API for XEMarketer Portal
- Managed SSL certificates and implemented bulk IP blacklisting via AWS S3 to WAF sync for Operation Portal
- Improved VAPT booking workflows for Security Portal
- Implemented PartiQL queries on DynamoDB for Login Portal user management, improving query throughput

Independent & Freelance Projects:
- Built standalone POS System for grocery retail with inventory management and sales reporting (C#, MySQL, Entity Framework)
- Developed Qurban Coupon Management System with OneWaySMS notifications, serving community events annually (.NET Core, MySQL)
- Deployed and maintained cloud infrastructure on DigitalOcean - Linux server, MySQL database, and .NET Core applications
- Built Attendance System integrating hardware biometric data with dual-database backend (MySQL, MSSQL)
- Deployed PHP-based event registration portal for Qurban operations

Hardware & IoT:
- Implemented face-recognition terminal for access control and attendance tracking
- Set up wireless CCTV surveillance system

- Developed and maintained POS System for F&B operations (VB.NET, MySQL)
- Integrated credit card terminal and e-wallet payment gateways with POS System (C# Web API)
- Built Kitchen Display System (KDS) for real-time order management (VB.NET, MySQL)
- Collaborated with QC teams on bug resolution and pre-production quality assurance

- Developed Stock Management System with barcode scanning support (C#, MSSQL)
- Gathered user requirements and built Stocktaking System from ground up (C#, SQLite)
- Enhanced Asset Management System for enterprise asset tracking (C#, MSSQL)
- Contributed to front-end web development and content management

- Gathered requirements and developed Payroll System for MARA (VB.NET)
- Performed server migration and UAT testing with MARA stakeholders
